# PERF-237 positive: errgroup always fans out with no tiny-N serial path
lang: go
file: PERF-237-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "golang.org/x/sync/errgroup"

func ProcessItems(items []Item) error {
	var group errgroup.Group
	group.SetLimit(8)
	for _, item := range items {
		item := item
		group.Go(func() error {
			return work(item)
		})
	}
	return group.Wait()
}

type Item struct{}

func work(Item) error { return nil }
